raw_consumer_statement:
The problem is with Citibank... again. 
I recently disputed several charges with XXXX. I do not have an account with XXXX eats and informed Citibank of this. They stated they would dispute charges and I was issued a new card. 
When I received an emailed statement, the charges were still on my account. I contacted their Executive Response Unit, again. All I received was a ticket number like some IT service desk.
